parsedJson.summary: The website uses a standard, slightly dated template with a generic stock photo and a cluttered navigation menu that distracts from the primary call to action.

issues.title: Hero text is hard to read against background
issues.what_observed: The large red headline 'ROOFSHIELD - ROOF RESTORATION' and the white subtext are placed directly over a busy aerial photo of a house. The red text blends with the reddish tones of the roof tiles, and the white text lacks sufficient contrast against the bright sky and white walls.
issues.why_problem: Visitors scanning the page will struggle to read the value proposition immediately. If a user cannot read the headline within 3 seconds, they assume the site is unprofessional or irrelevant and will bounce back to Google results.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A dark semi-transparent overlay (e.g., black at 40% opacity) behind the text, or a solid dark background section for the headline to ensure the white text pops. The red accent should be reserved for buttons, not large body text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Apply a dark gradient overlay to the hero image to ensure the white headline text has a contrast ratio of at least 7:1. Move the red color to the CTA buttons instead of the headline.
issues.plain_explanation: 大标题文字直接压在复杂的背景图上，导致文字颜色（红色和白色）与背景（屋顶和天空）混在一起，很难看清。
issues.customer_impact: 访客在几秒钟内无法看清您提供什么服务，会直接关闭网页。这会导致高达 40-60% 的潜在访客流失，因为他们觉得网站看起来不专业或难以阅读。

issues.title: Generic stock photo lacks local relevance
issues.what_observed: The main banner image is a generic aerial shot of a suburban house with a metal roof. It looks like a stock photo rather than a real project completed by Roofshield in Brisbane.
issues.why_problem: Local customers want to see that the business operates in their specific area. A generic image fails to build trust that the company is a 'local' expert. It feels like a faceless franchise.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-quality photo of a real Roofshield team member working on a roof in a recognizable Brisbane suburb, or a 'Before & After' slider of a local restoration project.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the stock image with a real photo of a recent job site in Brisbane. Add a caption like 'Restoring roofs in [Suburb Name]' to anchor the location.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页的大图看起来像是网上下载的通用素材，而不是你们在布里斯班实际做过的工程案例。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户更信任有真实案例展示的公司。使用通用图片会让客户怀疑你们是否是本地公司，从而降低信任度，导致他们选择竞争对手。

issues.title: Navigation menu is too crowded and distracting
issues.what_observed: The top navigation bar contains 8-9 menu items (Roofshield, Process, Repairs, About, Case studies, Gallery, Blog, Contact) spread across two rows, plus a 'Get Quote' button. The text is small and dense.
issues.why_problem: Too many choices cause 'analysis paralysis.' A user searching for 'roof repair' just wants to call or get a quote. They don't care about the 'Process' or 'Blog' right now. The clutter makes the site look busy and overwhelming.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simplified menu with max 4-5 items (Services, About, Gallery, Contact). Secondary items like 'Blog' or 'Process' should be hidden in a dropdown or footer.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Consolidate the menu. Keep only 'Services', 'Gallery', 'About', and 'Contact'. Move 'Blog' and 'Process' to the footer or a dropdown under Services.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部的导航菜单选项太多，排成了两行，显得非常拥挤，让用户不知道该点哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 过多的选项会让访客感到困惑，分散他们对‘获取报价’这一核心目标的注意力。简化菜单可以引导用户更快地联系您。

issues.title: Call-to-action buttons lack visual hierarchy
issues.what_observed: There are two buttons in the hero section: 'CALL US TODAY' and 'GET YOUR FREE QUOTE'. Both are identical in style (white outline, white text). There is no visual distinction between the primary and secondary action.
issues.why_problem: Users need to know which action is most important. By making both buttons look the same, you force the user to think. A clear hierarchy guides the user to the most valuable action (usually the quote or call).
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One solid, high-contrast button (e.g., bright red or orange) for the primary action ('Get Free Quote'), and a secondary outlined button for the less critical action ('Call Us').
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make the 'Get Your Free Quote' button a solid red/orange fill with white text to make it pop. Keep 'Call Us Today' as an outlined button.
issues.plain_explanation: 两个按钮长得一模一样，用户无法一眼看出哪个是最重要的操作。
issues.customer_impact: 缺乏视觉引导会让用户犹豫不决。突出主要按钮（如获取报价）可以显著提高转化率，预计可提升 10-20% 的点击率。

positive_observations: The logo is clear and legible, establishing brand identity.
The value proposition text ('Roof Restorations | Roof Painting...') clearly lists the services offered.
The 'Get Your Free Quote' button is present and visible above the fold.
redesign_priorities: 1. Improve hero text legibility by adding a dark overlay to the background image.
2. Replace the generic stock photo with a real local project image to build trust.
3. Simplify the navigation menu and create a clear visual hierarchy for the CTA buttons.
